columns.title: A little about me
paragraphs: A former cultural management student turned software developer, bringing a unique blend of creativity and technical skills to every project. My journey into coding began with a passion for problem-solving and a desire to create impactful digital experiences.
I am 26 years of age, and have lived my whole life in Helsinki, Finland. Besides coding, I enjoy exploring the outdoors, foraging mushrooms, cooking, yoga and most importantly - petting my cat.
I am eager to contribute to interesting projects as well as collaborate and learn from like-minded professionals.

columns.title: Skills
paragraphs: Started with curiosity, driven by creativity. I've explored everything from basic HTML to modern frameworks like React.
I value clean code, accessibility, and crafting thoughtful interfaces.
